name: Economy Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the yolks of eggs in a bowl.
2. Add milk, salt, flour, and baking powder to the egg yolks and mix together.
3. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten whites of eggs until well combined.
4. Cook the batter on a waffle iron until golden brown and crispy.
Source: Cora T. Riffle, Jerusalem Grange, Adams County, OH
